# pfsense_cron_jobs (Data Source)

Retrieves all [cron jobs](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/packages/cron.html). Cron jobs are scheduled tasks that run commands at specified intervals.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `cron_jobs` (Attributes List) List of cron jobs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cron_jobs))

<a id="nestedatt--cron_jobs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cron_jobs`

Read-Only:

- `command` (String) Command to execute.
- `hour` (String) Hour schedule field (0-23, or '*' for every hour).
- `mday` (String) Day of month schedule field (1-31, or '*' for every day).
- `minute` (String) Minute schedule field (0-59, or '*' for every minute).
- `month` (String) Month schedule field (1-12, or '*' for every month).
- `wday` (String) Day of week schedule field (0-7 where 0 and 7 are Sunday, or '*' for every day).
- `who` (String) User to run the command as (e.g. 'root').
